message:
🌱 Add telepresence: arm64 processor support mission (#855)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,78 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "telepresence-753-error-when-kubernetes-cluster-is-running-on-arm64-processor",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "telepresence: Error when kubernetes cluster is running on arm64 processor",
+    "description": "Error when kubernetes cluster is running on arm64 processor. This issue affects 7+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify telepresence troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your telepresence deployment:\n```bash\ntelepresence version\ntelepresence status\nkubectl get pods -n ambassador\n```\nLook for pod crash errors on arm64 nodes, such as `RuntimeError: Pod isn't starting or can't be found`."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review the error",
+        "description": "When running telepresence on a Kubernetes cluster with arm64 nodes, the telepresence agent pod fails to start because the container images were only built for amd64 architecture. This results in a crash with errors like:\n```\nRuntimeError: Pod isn't starting or can't be found\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for arm64 support",
+        "description": "The fix updates the tel2/tel2-base image build to be multiarch (supporting both amd64 and arm64), so telepresence can be used in Kubernetes clusters running on ARM nodes.\n\nUpgrade to the telepresence version that includes multiarch image support:\n```bash\nbrew upgrade datawire/blackbird/telepresence\n```\nOr download the latest binary for your platform from the telepresence releases page."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm the issue is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that telepresence works on arm64 clusters:\n```bash\ntelepresence connect\ntelepresence status\nkubectl get pods -n ambassador\n```\nConfirm that the telepresence agent pod starts successfully on arm64 nodes."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Updated the tel2/tel2-base image build to be multiarch (amd64 and arm64), enabling telepresence to work on Kubernetes clusters running on ARM processor nodes.",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "telepresence",
+      "sandbox",
+      "app-definition",
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "telepresence"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [
+      "Pod",
+      "Deployment",
+      "Namespace"
+    ],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "sandbox",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/telepresenceio/telepresence/issues/753",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/telepresenceio/telepresence",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/telepresenceio/telepresence/pull/2069"
+    },
+    "reactions": 7,
+    "comments": 13,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl",
+      "telepresence"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with telepresence installed. Install via: brew install datawire/blackbird/telepresence (macOS) or binary download."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-12T06:46:19.988Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",
+    "sanitized": true,
+    "findings": []
+  }
+}
